result.markdown:
# Water Quality Parameters Results ## Interpreting Box Plots Each of the following graphs display the sampling results for a specific parameter, such as arsenic. Within these graphs, a box and extending lines represent the results reported at each sampling site. A horizontal line within the box corresponds to the median of the data. The box contains 50% of the data and the vertical lines display the minimum and maximum values. Any data points that fall outside of the acceptable range are outliers and are portrayed as small circles (@fig-boxplot1). ![Components of a box plot](other/documents/images/boxplots.jpg){#fig-boxplot1}
